visual_description: A silhouetted man descends a staircase while looking down at a bustling hallway below. The view shifts to a checkered-floor corridor where men in light blue shirts and ties walk and stand near a glass partition. A close-up follows a serious-looking man in a light blue shirt and striped tie as he moves with a group through the corridor.
audio_description: Ambient indoor sounds are heard, including footsteps and distant murmurs.
